title: Fix handling of Slices versus Arrays
body:
Cobra does not allow a "," in a StringSlice, so we should
be using StringArrays.  This fixes issues with setting
security-opts level flags.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: @edsantiago added test to make sure this does not happen again.

Looks like the test @edsantiago was wondering why it was not failing prior is now failing with these changes.

```
not ok 159 from security-opt test
# (in test file ./from.bats, line 379)
#   `[[ $output =~ "s0:c1,c2" ]]' failed
# time="2019-04-02T19:39:58Z" level=debug msg="[graphdriver] trying provided driver "vfs"" 
# mycontainer
# time="2019-04-02T19:39:58Z" level=debug msg="[graphdriver] trying provided driver "vfs"" 
```
LGTM but I'm seeing weird CI failures in my test setup; looks like docker.io weirdness. Will troubleshoot later this afternoon.
